items.title: This touchscreen mouse is my over-engineering nightmare

items.title: Google’s new gradient icon design is coming to more apps
items.desc: In late 2025, Google started rolling out new icons with a gradient design. items.title: Trump fires the entire National Science Board
items.desc: Multiple sources are reporting that the Trump administration has dismissed the entire National Science Board (NSB). The NSB advises the president and Congress on the National Science Foundation (NSF), which has already been funding research at historically low levels and has seen significant delays in doling out that funding. items.title: An influx of used EVs could drive down prices
items.desc: Part of what has held back electric cars has been the cost. But an influx of used vehicles over the next three years could bring prices down dramatically.
